attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TRIM(CAST(SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID AS BIGINT)) AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CBN_DISTI_ID,-999) AS RU_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS QUOTE_NAME,
COALESCE(NCWP.CEC_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS LDAP_USER_ID ,
--COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD, /*Commented and added below line for DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD as part of CCW data fix*/
COALESCE(CTS.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD, 
COALESCE(D_EXTN.APPROVAL_ROUTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
NULL AS GROSS_MARGIN_PCT,
SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE AS DEAL_QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DT,
/*COALESCE(Q_LINE.LIST_PRICE,0) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
/*COALESCE(Q_LINE.NET_PRICE,0) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_PRDT_DSCNT_PCT,
0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_SVC_DSCNT_PCT,
SNGL_QTE.UPDATED_ON AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,
SNGL_QTE.CREATED_ON AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
SNGL_QTE.UPDATED_BY AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
SNGL_QTE.CREATED_BY AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(PRICE_LST.ERP_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNK') AS PRICE_LIST_NAME,
COALESCE(DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
SNGL_QTE.LAST_PRICED_DATE AS LAST_PRICE_DTM,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS FROM_CURRENCY_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FEDERAL_FLG,'N') AS FEDERAL_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.TAA_FLG,'N') AS TRADE_ACT_FLG,
-- CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CONVERSION_DT, -- Commented as part of MDM
COALESCE(SNGL_SCNE.CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_DATE,QUOTE.CONVERSION_DT,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CONVERSION_DT,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_ERATE_DEAL,'N') AS ERATE_FLG,
SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID AS SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.ACTIVE,'Y') AS ACTIVE_FLG,   /* ADDED AS PART OF CCWR DATA FIX AUG REL */
'USD' AS TO_CURRENCY_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FRAME_AGREEEMENT,'N') AS FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
COALESCE(LOC_KEY.BILL_LOC_KEY,-999) AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_LOCATOR_KEY,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN') AS INTENDED_USE_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.BOM_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS BOM_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.TRADEIN_STATE,'N') AS TRADE_IN_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,'N') AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS IS_QUOTE_TO_ORGER_ELIGiBLE_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS DISTRIBUTOR_ORDERABLE_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS,'N') AS AUTO_NEGOTIATE_FLG,
SNGL_QTE.IS_STRINGENT AS IS_STRINGENT_FLG,
SNGL_QTE.IS_FINALIZED AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_FA_FLAG,'N') AS REUSABLE_NON_STNDRD_DSCNT_ROLE,
COALESCE(CAST(SNGL_QTE.CBN_STATUS AS CHAR(1) ),'N') AS CISCO_BOOKINGS_NEUTRALITY_ROLE,
TRIM(COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FA_DEAL_ID,'-999')) AS RU_PARENT_QUOTE_NUM,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS RU_CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBILITY_FLG,
COALESCE(DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID,'-999') AS DV_RNSD_PARENT_ID, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CRP_FLG,'N') AS CRP_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.GDR_FLG,'N') AS GDR_FLG,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.STD_INCR_FLAG,'N') AS INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS CBN_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,-999) AS LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT,
COALESCE(CAST(SNGL_QTE.LEAD_PARTNERS  AS INTEGER),-999) AS LEAD_PTNR_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
'CCWR' AS SS_CODE,
SNGL_QTE.BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
CASE 
  WHEN UPPER(SNGL_QTE.IS_PCM ) = 'TRUE' THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N'
END AS IS_PUBLIC_CLD_MARKETPLACE_FLG, 
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM  
(
SELECT 
OBJECT_ID                     ,
DEAL_OBJECT_ID                ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATED_ON                    ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
UPDATED_ON                    ,
ACTIVE                        ,
FRAME_AGREEEMENT              ,
PRICE_LIST_ID                 ,
LAST_PRICED_DATE              ,
BOM_SOURCE                    ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
QUOTE_ID                      ,
QUOTE_NAME                    ,
TRADEIN_STATE                 ,
CBN_STATUS                    ,
CBN_DISTI_ID                  ,
IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE               ,
AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS             ,
CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE            ,
IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE         ,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
INTENDED_USE                  ,
QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE         ,
IS_STRINGENT                  ,
IS_FINALIZED                  ,
IS_FA_FLAG                    ,
FA_DEAL_ID                    ,
FEDERAL_FLG                   ,
TAA_FLG                       ,
IS_ERATE_DEAL                 ,
QUOTE_STATUS_NAME             ,
GDR_FLAG GDR_FLG,
STD_INCR_FLAG                 ,
CRP_FLAG CRP_FLG,
LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE    ,
LEAD_PARTNERS   ,
CURRENCY_CODE ,
QUOTE_STATUS_ID,
COALESCE (BUY_METHOD,'UNKNOWN') AS BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
IS_PCM
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_RNWL_VW STG
)SNGL_QTE
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
ON SNGL_QTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_NS_DEAL_EXTN_VW_RNWL D_EXTN
ON DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT = D_EXTN.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_SCENARIO_VW QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REFERENCE_OBJECT_ID, DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_DATE DESC)=1 ) SNGL_SCNE
ON SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID = SNGL_SCNE.REFERENCE_OBJECT_ID
-- AND SNGL_QTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = SNGL_SCNE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID 
AND SNGL_SCNE.PUBLISHED_DATE IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_PRICE_LIST PRICE_LST
ON PRICE_LST.PRICE_LIST_ID =  SNGL_QTE.PRICE_LIST_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT QUOTE_OBJECT_ID QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, SUM(EXT_LIST_PRICE) LIST_PRICE,SUM(FINAL_NET_PRICE) NET_PRICE 
            FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_RNWL_VW GROUP BY QUOTE_OBJECT_ID) Q_LINE
ON SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT QUOTE_OBJECT_ID QUO_OBJ_ID, BILLTO_LOCATION BILLTO_LOC, ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_LOC_KEY
        FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DEAL_BILL_TO_RNWL BILLTO
        INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT,ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE
        QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ORDER BY  CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY DESC,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC)=1) BILLKEY  
    ON BILLKEY.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = cast(BILLTO.BILLTO_LOCATION as BIGINT) AND BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
        QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY QUO_OBJ_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATED_DATE  DESC)=1 ) LOC_KEY 
ON LOC_KEY.QUO_OBJ_ID = SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = SNGL_QTE.CURRENCY_CODE 
AND NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 
AND NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
ON NCWP.CEC_ID = SNGL_QTE.CREATED_BY
AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE ='A'
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_CSS_QOT_STATUSES_B CTS
ON SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_STATUS_ID = CTS.QUOTE_STATUS_ID 
-- Newly added to populate currency conversion date
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE QUOTE
ON SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_ID = QUOTE.BK_QUOTE_NUM
WHERE SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID IS NOT NULL
AND DEAL.SS_CODE = 'CCWR'

SELECT	SINGLE_QUOTE.OBJECT_ID, SINGLE_QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, SINGLE_QUOTE.CREATED_BY,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.CREATED_ON, SINGLE_QUOTE.UPDATED_BY, SINGLE_QUOTE.UPDATED_ON,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.ACTIVE, SINGLE_QUOTE.FRAME_AGREEEMENT, SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICE_LIST_ID,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.LAST_PRICED_DATE, SINGLE_QUOTE.BOM_SOURCE, SINGLE_QUOTE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_ID, SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_NAME, SINGLE_QUOTE.TRADEIN_STATE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_STATUS, SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_DISTI_ID, SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS, SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE, SINGLE_QUOTE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.INTENDED_USE, SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_STRINGENT, SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_FINALIZED, SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_FA_FLAG,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.FA_DEAL_ID, SINGLE_QUOTE.FEDERAL_FLG, SINGLE_QUOTE.TAA_FLG,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_ERATE_DEAL, SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME, SINGLE_QUOTE.GDR_FLAG GDR_FLG,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.STD_INCR_FLAG, SINGLE_QUOTE.CRP_FLAG CRP_FLG, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.LEAD_PARTNERS ,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.CURRENCY_CODE,
		/* ADDED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL */
		SINGLE_QUOTE.ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID,        
		SINGLE_QUOTE.NET_PRICE_DEAL,            
		SINGLE_QUOTE.SOURCE_TYPE,                   
		SINGLE_QUOTE.PROD_PRICING_COMMENT,          
		SINGLE_QUOTE.SERV_PRICING_COMMENT,          
		SINGLE_QUOTE.INACTIVE_OBJECT_ID,            
		SINGLE_QUOTE.BOM_STATE,                     
		SINGLE_QUOTE.CART_ID,                       
		SINGLE_QUOTE.SITE_OBJECT_ID,                
		SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE,             
		SINGLE_QUOTE.DISCOUNT_SUMMARY,              
		SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_FLAG,                      
		SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_SUBTRACK,                  
		SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_PERIOD,                    
		SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICE_BOOK_ID,                 
		SINGLE_QUOTE.BILLING_TERM,                  
		SINGLE_QUOTE.FULFILLMENT_SOURCE_ID,         
		SINGLE_QUOTE.IRONPORT_FLAG,                 
		SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICED_FOR_AUTH,               
		SINGLE_QUOTE.COPY_FROM_QUOTE,               
		SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS_ID,                  
		SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_CATEGORY,                
		SINGLE_QUOTE.CUSTOMER_CATALOG_FLAG,         
		SINGLE_QUOTE.RN,                            
		SINGLE_QUOTE.INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.BUY_METHOD,
		SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_PCM
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_RNWL_VW SINGLE_QUOTE
WHERE	NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL
WHERE	SINGLE_QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT
AND DEAL.SS_CODE = 'CCWR' ) /* Added as part of CCWR */
